# zstack_preconfiguration_template (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage preconfiguration templates in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content` (String) Template content.
- `distribution` (String) Distribution of the preconfiguration template.
- `name` (String) The name of the preconfiguration template.
- `type` (String) Type of the preconfiguration template.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the preconfiguration template.

### Read-Only

- `is_predefined` (Boolean) Whether this template is predefined by the system.
- `md5sum` (String) MD5 checksum of the template content.
- `state` (String) Current state of the preconfiguration template.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the preconfiguration template.
